content:
TMUX shortcuts

[Sessions]
:new    new
s       list
$       rename

[Windows]
c       new
w       list
n / p   next / prev
f       find
,       rename
&       kill

[Panes]
%       split vertical
"       split horizontal
o       switch
q       numbers
x       kill

z       zoom
space   layout

{ / }   move pane
+       break
-       restore
